name: Rauf Muritala
headline: Building scalable data platforms and analytics systems.
tagline: I design production-grade pipelines, warehouses, and analytics layers on Azure, AWS, and GCP — turning raw, fragmented data into reliable foundations for decision-making.

snapshot.caption: Azure · AWS · GCP · Databricks · dbt · Spark · Airflow

about: I'm a Data Engineer focused on building data platforms that hold up in production — systems with clear contracts, tested models, observable failures, and costs you can explain.

My work spans the full lifecycle: ingesting raw transactional and event data, structuring it through layered architectures, modeling it for analytics, and delivering it to the business through warehouses and BI tools.
